note: OCR title heavily garbled ('LLE.\An\E') but description clearly matches a predio in Pollenza, Inca. Likely 'LLENAIRE' (well-known Pollenza locality).

entries.title: LLENAIRE
entries.description: Predio en la isla de Mallorca, prov. de Baleares, part. jud. de Inca, térm. y jurisd. de la v. de Pollenza.
